languages.text: "Коновалы из Сектора Бионика убили моего сына. Мне обещали, что Гнотек выйдет отсюда как новенький, но он не вышел — выполз, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceAugmentator}накачанный химией{/d}, и сдох у меня на руках, исходя пеной, будто пустотная крыса. Ради этого мы служили? Такова благодарность за то, что мы себя под выстрелы и удары вражеские подставляли? Я пришла забрать должок".

"The healers from the Sector Bionica killed my son. They promised me that Gnotec would come out of here good as new, but he didn't — he crawled out, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceAugmentator}dosed up on chemicals{/d}, and died in my arms, foaming at the mouth like some void rat. Is this what we served for? Is this the thanks we get for putting ourselves in harm's way? I've come to collect my debt."
languages.original_text: "Коновалы из Сектора Бионика убили моего сына. Мне обещали, что Гнотек выйдет отсюда как новенький, но он не вышел — выполз, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceAugmentator}накачанный химией{/d}, и сдох у меня на руках, исходя пеной, будто пустотная крыса. Ради этого мы служили? Такова благодарность за то, что мы себя под выстрелы и удары вражеские подставляли? Я пришла забрать должок".

Is this what we served for? Is this the thanks we get for putting ourselves in harm's way? I've come to collect my debt."

languages.text: 「セクター・ビオニカの治療師が息子を殺した。グノテックはここで治るだろうと約束したのに、彼は治らなかった。薬物で朦朧とした状態で這い出て、私の腕の中で口から泡を吐きながら死んだ。こんなもののために戦ったのか？敵の銃弾や攻撃をかわすために命を懸けたのに、こんな報いを受けるのか。私は借金を回収しに来たのだ」
languages.original_text: "The healers from the Sector Bionica killed my son. They promised me that Gnotec would come out of here good as new, but he didn't — he crawled out, dosed up on chemicals, and died in my arms, foaming at the mouth like some void rat. Is this what we served for? Is this the thanks we get for throwing ourselves in front of enemy shots and blows? I've come to collect my debt."

traits.locale_text: 「セクター・ビオニカの治療師が息子を殺した。グノテックはここで治るだろうと約束したのに、彼は治らなかった。薬物で朦朧とした状態で這い出て、私の腕の中で口から泡を吐きながら死んだ。こんなもののために戦ったのか？敵の銃弾や攻撃をかわすために命を懸けたのに、こんな報いを受けるのか。私は借金を回収しに来たのだ。」

languages.text: "Sektör Biyonika şifacıları oğlumu öldürdü. Bana Gnotec'in buradan sapasağlam çıkacağına söz verdiler ama çıkmadı. {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceAugmentator}Kimyasallara boğulmuş{/d} hâlde sürünerek çıktı ve bir uçsuz faresi gibi ağzından köpükler saçarak kollarımda öldü. Bunun için mi hizmet ettik? Kendimizi tehlikeye atmanın karşılığı bu mu? Alacağımı tahsil etmeye geldim."
languages.original_text: "The healers from the Sector Bionica killed my son. They promised me that Gnotec would come out of here good as new, but he didn't — he crawled out, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceAugmentator}dosed up on chemicals{/d}, and died in my arms, foaming at the mouth like some void rat. Is this what we served for? Is this the thanks we get for putting ourselves in harm's way? I've come to collect my debt."

traits.locale_text: "Sektör Biyonika şifacıları oğlumu öldürdü. Bana Gnotec'in buradan sapasağlam çıkacağına söz verdiler ama çıkmadı. {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceAugmentator}Kimyasallara boğulmuş{/d} hâlde sürünerek çıktı ve bir uçsuz faresi gibi ağzından köpükler saçarak kollarımda öldü. Bunun için mi hizmet ettik? Kendimizi tehlikeye atmanın karşılığı bu mu? Alacağımı tahsil etmeye geldim."

languages.text: «Los curanderos del Sector Bionica mataron a mi hijo. Me prometieron que Gnotec volvería como nuevo, pero no fue así: vino arrastrándose, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceAugmentator}hasta arriba de químicos{/d}, y murió en mis brazos, echando espuma por la boca como una rata del vacío. ¿Para esto hemos servido? ¿Esta es nuestra recompensa por el peligro que corremos? Vengo a cobrarme mi deuda».
languages.original_text: "The healers from the Sector Bionica killed my son. They promised me that Gnotec would come out of here good as new, but he didn't — he crawled out, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceAugmentator}dosed up on chemicals{/d}, and died in my arms, foaming at the mouth like some void rat. Is this what we served for? Is this the thanks we get for putting ourselves in harm's way? I've come to collect my debt."

traits.locale_text: «Los curanderos del Sector Bionica mataron a mi hijo. Me prometieron que Gnotec volvería como nuevo, pero no fue así: vino arrastrándose, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceAugmentator}hasta arriba de químicos{/d}, y murió en mis brazos, echando espuma por la boca como una rata del vacío. ¿Para esto hemos servido? ¿Esta es nuestra recompensa por el peligro que corremos? Vengo a cobrarme mi deuda».

languages.text: “仿生区的治疗师害死了我的儿子。他们向我保证诺泰克出来的时候会完好如初，但他没有——他是爬出来的，被{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceAugmentator}灌满了化学药剂{/d}，最后像只虚空鼠一样口吐白沫，死在了我的怀里。这就是我们服役的下场吗？这就是我们将自己置于险境的回报吗？现在，我来讨债了。”
languages.original_text: "The healers from the Sector Bionica killed my son. They promised me that Gnotec would come out of here good as new, but he didn't — he crawled out, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceAugmentator}dosed up on chemicals{/d}, and died in my arms, foaming at the mouth like some void rat. Is this what we served for? Is this the thanks we get for putting ourselves in harm's way? I've come to collect my debt."

traits.locale_text: “仿生区的治疗师害死了我的儿子。他们向我保证诺泰克出来的时候会完好如初，但他没有——他是爬出来的，被{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceAugmentator}灌满了化学药剂{/d}，最后像只虚空鼠一样口吐白沫，死在了我的怀里。这就是我们服役的下场吗？这就是我们将自己置于险境的回报吗？现在，我来讨债了。”

languages.text: « Les soignants du secteur Bionica ont tué mon fils. Ils m'avaient promis que Gnotec serait comme neuf après son traitement, mais c'était faux. Il est sorti en rampant, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceAugmentator}bourré de stimulants{/d}, et il est mort dans mes bras, la bave aux lèvres comme un rat du vide. Est-ce pour finir ainsi que nous accomplissons loyalement notre devoir ? Est-ce comme ça que l'on remercie ceux qui ont risqué leur vie ? Je suis venue toucher mon dû. »
languages.original_text: "The healers from the Sector Bionica killed my son. They promised me that Gnotec would come out of here good as new, but he didn't — he crawled out, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceAugmentator}dosed up on chemicals{/d}, and died in my arms, foaming at the mouth like some void rat. Is this what we served for? Is this the thanks we get for putting ourselves in harm's way? I've come to collect my debt."

traits.locale_text: « Les soignants du secteur Bionica ont tué mon fils. Ils m'avaient promis que Gnotec serait comme neuf après son traitement, mais c'était faux. Il est sorti en rampant, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceAugmentator}bourré de stimulants{/d}, et il est mort dans mes bras, la bave aux lèvres comme un rat du vide. Est-ce pour finir ainsi que nous accomplissons loyalement notre devoir ? Est-ce comme ça que l'on remercie ceux qui ont risqué leur vie ? Je suis venue toucher mon dû. »

languages.text: "Die Heiler aus dem Sektor Bionica haben meinen Sohn getötet. Sie haben mir versprochen, Gnotec würde danach so gut wie neu sein, aber das war er nicht — er kam herausgekrochen, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceAugmentator}mit Chemie vollgepumpt{/d}, und starb in meinen Armen, mit Schaum vor dem Mund wie eine Leerenratte. Haben wir dafür etwa gedient? Ist das der Dank, dass wir uns der Gefahr in den Weg gestellt haben? Ich bin hier, um meine Schulden einzutreiben."
languages.original_text: "The healers from the Sector Bionica killed my son. They promised me that Gnotec would come out of here good as new, but he didn't — he crawled out, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceAugmentator}dosed up on chemicals{/d}, and died in my arms, foaming at the mouth like some void rat. Is this what we served for? Is this the thanks we get for putting ourselves in harm's way? I've come to collect my debt."
